title: I Love Knowing Where My Money Is
subtitle: An affirmation for building a confident, curious relationship with tracking
excerpt: A short affirmation for shifting from avoidance to active attention around money tracking. Where checking the balance used to feel like bracing for bad news, this affirmation builds the habit of looking with calm interest.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 51 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program to Attract Cash, Overflow & Abundance Without Hustle or Burnout (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798268793796).

content.text: A brief affirmation for building a curious, attentive relationship with money tracking. The shift from 'I check when I have to' to 'I love knowing where my money is' is a change in orientation: from monitoring to engagement.
The affirmation names knowing as something you want, not something you endure. Familiarity with your numbers is one of the quietest forms of financial confidence.
I love knowing where my money is. I check in with curiosity. I track with ease.
Say it out loud three times before opening your banking app or sitting down with your accounts. Repeat it whenever you notice the urge to put the check-in off.
Adapted from Day 51 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). Works well alongside the Sunday money date ritual.
